task_description: Implement Phase 3 - EDR Engine with full monitoring capabilities: ProcessMonitor, FileMonitor, RegistryMonitor, MemoryMonitor, BehaviorAnalyzer, DetectionRulesEngine, AlertManager, TelemetryCollector, PersistenceDetection, RansomwareDetection, LateralMovementDetection, IncidentTimeline. Update EDR and Monitor stubs to fully functional implementations.

verification.summary: 156 test cases pass (80+ new EDR tests). Build completes successfully. All 12 EDR components implemented with full integration via EDREngine orchestrator and MonitorEngine delegation. Review-fix pass 1 addressed 7 issues: wired feedEventsToAnalysis and detectLateralMovement, added capacity limits to AlertManager/RegistryMonitor/IncidentTimeline, pre-compiled regex in DetectionRulesEngine, removed redundant proc read. Review-fix pass 2 addressed 4 issues: cursor-based event processing in feedEventsToAnalysis to prevent duplicate re-processing, LateralMovementIndicator.severity field now set (high/critical), timestamp field stores ISO 8601 time with descriptions moved to technique field, AlertManager dedup uses unordered_map for O(1) lookups.
